content: [setup] Install Python deps, DB schema, backend routes (auth + sessions + AI streaming)
[setup] Install Node deps, PWA manifest, vite.config, global types
[frontend] Auth context, session context, App.tsx routing, Splash/Auth/NewProject screens
[wizard] Stage 1 Identify form (all podcast types + True Crime intake) + Stage 2 Intake Review
[wizard] Stage 3 Research (streaming AI) + Stage 4 Research Review
[wizard] Stages 5-12: Drafts, Polish, Production Blocks, Final Review, Export
